programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Swallowed Up
programme.desc: Carlos, Dustin and James battle fast and violent rapids. They must engineer a way to slow the rapids down or risk being washed over the 80-foot waterfall. A faulty dredge valve on Fred's operation becomes explosive.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Mammoth Claw
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is finally down to virgin ground but discovers their equipment is no match for the giant boulders at Rockfall Ravine, so Wes fabricates a new tool for their arsenal: The Mammoth Claw. Fred puts greenhorn Scott to the test.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: On a gold streak, Dustin dives deeper than ever and uncovers the largest obstacle of his career. New recruit Scott finally gets the opportunity to prove himself in the water, but a rookie mistake could end his career just as it gets started.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Gets a Show
programme.desc: Tony and Minnie check in from Mexico. Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra share a sneak peek of their new show, Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue, and Dave Turin gets in on the fun. Later, Mike Rowe checks in to talk about his new show.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dirt: From the Vault
programme.desc: The Dirt celebrates the halfway point for this season of Gold Rush with a mix of never-before-seen footage and our favourite moments: Parker and Fred's confrontation, Rick's history as a football player and an interview with Tyler Mahoney from down under.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lost Gold of Paradise Hill
programme.desc: Tony fires up a second plant to haul in gold left behind by the old-timers. Tensions rise when Parker departs for Alaska, leaving Mitch in charge. Rick faces disaster when he his sluice box springs a leak.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to Alaska
programme.desc: Parker returns to Alaska to prospect new ground and expand his empire. Rick digs deep for big gold in a cut he hopes will deliver the biggest weigh in of the season. Fred's crew member Johnny comes up with unique fix to their water problem.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Gets a Show
programme.desc: Tony and Minnie check in from Mexico. Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra share a sneak peek of their new show, Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue, and Dave Turin gets in on the fun. Later, Mike Rowe checks in to talk about his new show.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Homestead for the Holidays
programme.desc: Otto decides to give his "Wacky Yak" to a friend, but the gift rejects the idea of being given. Atz Lee gathers lumps of coal--for the nice--as his gift. Atz deals with cows on ice to bring a friend's herd home.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Christmas Kaboom!
programme.desc: In true homesteader holiday spirit, the Kilchers put their own spin on a Secret Santa gift exchange: hand-making something useful for someone in the family. With gifts ranging from a crossbow to explosives this Christmas special is filled with surprises.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Dam Break, Airborne Boat
programme.desc: Three homes collapse into a river after a dam break results in a devastating flood, and a soldier is sucked into a jet engine on an aircraft carrier.

programme.title: Lunkerville: Ice Fishing for Donkeys
programme.desc: Mike get a lesson in ice fishing from a New Hampshire bartender.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: 2020 World Championship - Championship Round
programme.desc: Join 48 of the world's best professional anglers as they compete in fishing tournaments.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Into the Red
programme.desc: Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to form an alliance with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into Russian waters for golden crab and Josh bets it all on a gut feeling. Later, Wild Bill turns to his last resort and seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as captains and crew brace for the loss of friends during a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line, and the clock is ticking for Wild Bill and Junior during the cod derby.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Popping Popeye
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Season's Squeezings
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for squeezin' as Dr. Lee and her staff fa-la-la-la-POP their way through the day! With lumpy lipomas and cysts-a-plenty, they'll have their hands full during one of their busiest days of the year!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Runaway Bump, Never Coming Back?
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off of his arm that looks like it's breaking through the skin. Brandon has several lumps on his head that makes him fearful for his life. Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.desc: Sabrina Bryan of 'The Cheetah Girls' has a dress-shopping date with designer Hayley Paige and one of Kleinfeld's own consultants is going to be a bride herself!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The WAG
programme.desc: Bride Lyndzie believes she was royalty in a past life and this WAG intends to have a royal wedding in this life. Bride Ashley wants a dress that's not too revealing so her mom won't have a heart attack.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Having a Moment
programme.desc: Bride Courtney is determined to look at every dress in Kleinfeld. Bride Brianna wants a dress inspired by a movie.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 200% Trouble With This Dress
programme.desc: It's all about the bling when Samantha falls for a dress that's twice her budget. Krystina wants simple while her mom wants over the top. Shannon ordered a custom gown for her Irish I do's.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Showtime
programme.desc: It's a star studded premiere as Jenna and Val from "Dancing With the Stars" waltz into Kleinfeld to find her dream dress. WWE Hall of Famer Mick Foley steps out of the ring to help his friend Heather find a last minute dress after hers is ruined.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Flight
programme.desc: Pnina megafan Julianna wants the sexiest dress ever but her fiancé's family are afraid she'll say yes to a dress she'll regret. Plus, jumpsuit enthusiast Randell wants a wedding onesie - too bad Randy and Lisa can't find any.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Will Show You The Door
programme.desc: Bridal model Jessica is depending on her feisty friends to help her make a decision, but when they get out of control Randy has to step in. New mom Marlo is back with her outspoken twin Margo and hopes she can keep her brutally honest comments in check.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cinderella Gone Wrong
programme.desc: After losing her dress in the California wildfires, Eryka comes to Kleinfeld hoping she can fall in love with a new dress. Shay helps Ashley feel sexy after losing over 100 pounds. Randy helps a desperate bride whose dress has disappeared.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Delusional Bride/ Talk to Me!/ Front Seat Baby
programme.desc: A pregnant woman delivers in the front seat of her car and a bride stops her wedding because she feels possessed by creatures crawling in her head. Later, a physician yells at her comatose heart attack patient, trying to get him to fight for his own life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Cowboy Chaos
programme.desc: A deranged cowboy is drenched in sweat, saliva and urine and no one knows why. A metal rod is impaled into the side of a young woman's head. Two teenage girls are dangerously short of breath.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Pipe in the Head
programme.desc: A conscious man is wheeled into the ER with a two-inch pipe through his head. A young bride is experiencing unstoppable bleeding and her groom is clueless. Two prisoners from rival gangs are suspiciously in the ER at the same time.

programme.title: Shockwave
programme.desc: Watch as a helicopter in Hawaii crashes and a huge man named Tiny lifts the 1,500 pound chopper by himself, enabling rescuers to pull the pilot out. In the town of Punta Gorda, Florida storm chasers are caught in the eye of Hurricane Charley.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Humiliation for the Holidays
programme.desc: In this holiday special, Sal, Q, Murr and Joe revisit wild show moments, sharing their favourite 'toys' and spending quality time at the mall.

programme.title: Movie: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Two pals decide to do something right by driving across the country to return a briefcase.

programme.title: Movie: Dumb and Dumber

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Do Something to My Face
programme.desc: The guys enlist shoppers to settle senseless debates in the mall, scream for ice-cream as patrons in a parlour and protest unconventional causes in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Theater del Absurdo
programme.desc: The guys raise money for absurd charities at a donut shop, join diners mid-meal in a Chinese restaurant, and offer unsolicited advice to shoppers in a mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drawing a Blank

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Junk in the Trunk

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Malls
programme.desc: Adam and Emily go on a shopping spree of knowledge, where he illustrates that malls were created as tax loopholes for greedy developers and are now crumbling under their own weight.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: The First Factsgiving
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't break bread with Native Americans, but did dig up their graves. There was no romance between Pocahontas and John Smith, and cities in the New World rivaled London in scale before their 'discovery.'

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Christmas
programme.desc: Adam teaches his sister that the story of the real St. Nick is a lot creepier than she thought, while modern Santa was created by commercialism only a century ago. Adam also illustrates why the act of gift-giving actually hurts the economy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Great Gear
programme.desc: Guy's grabbing grub cooked up with some great gear. In San Francisco, a place firin' up lights-out lamb and huge pork biscuits in some of the city's last remaining indoor smokers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort and Soul
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' up some joints that'll warm the palate and the soul. In Portland, Ore., a funky neighbourhood cafe is cranking out comfort foods like the heartless artichoke sandwich and a curried lentil dish that hits all the right notes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Asia, Africa And India
programme.desc: Guy's going international with flavors from Asia, Africa and India. In Los Angeles, a funky fast Filipino joint spicin' up house-made hot dogs and piling pork adobo onto grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Streamlined Sammies
programme.desc: In Texas, a trailer serves scratch-made sammies to customers on the street and in the bar. In Minneapolis, a food truck offers lobster rolls. And in Dallas, burgers are served.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Amazing Appetizers
programme.desc: It is a first-course feast, as Guy Fieri digs into amazing appetizers. From Miami to Kansas to the Pacific Northwest, he grabs tots, jalapeno poppers, unique fritters, and even Rocky Mountain oysters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Request
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a fast food joint in Charlotte, a neighbourhood favourite for grilled cheese sandwiches in Lakewood and a British Pub in Houston serving shepherd's pie made from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Called It
programme.desc: Guy visits an old diner in Kentucky for fresh bread and Oyster Po' Boy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Guy's traveling all over the country searching for a taste of the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: To Bakersfield and Beyond
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's giving some love to a little town with a lot of flavor. In Bakersfield, Calif., the landmark Basque spot serving a four-course meal including outrageous oxtail and garlic fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Bowlful of Soul
programme.desc: In Charlotte, N.C., a down-home hangout dishes out low country favourites, like killer collard greens and standout shrimp and grits. In Las Vegas, a strip mall spot serves up both savoury and sweet crepe specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Something From Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers real deal dishes born elsewhere in Norwalk, CT, Minneapolis and Chicago.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers 'n More
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a warehouse-turned-burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Bacon, Eggs, Taco Tots Burritos
programme.desc: Rachael has breakfast for dinner with her bacon, beans, eggs, taco tots burritos rolled in one tortilla. She layers eggs with refried beans, pico de gallo and cheese, plus tater tots with taco spice instead of plain hash browns.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Anniversary Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her husband, Tom, were married on New Year's Day, and this year they're celebrating their anniversary with a variety of lucky New Year's foods for an extra jolt of good luck for the coming year.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Countdown To New Year's Brunch
programme.desc: The Kitchen is counting down to New Year's brunch starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's baked eggs with kale, green chiles and feta. Jeff Mauro pops some bubbly for his strawberry and Prosecco scones with sparkling lemon icing.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Italian Christmas Brunch
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a gorgeous formal brunch for her family on Christmas day, with a California twist on some favorite Italian dishes.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Live Well Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis helps her girlfriends jump-start the new year with a fun gathering that focuses on wellness and self-care.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Brunch Bites
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is serving up brunch ideas that are perfect for the holidays and everyday. Her kids are the film crew as she takes four favorites to the next level, from a build-your-own leftover frittata sandwich board to a crispy a.m. wrap.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast on the Run
programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Brunchday Funday
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are helping you pull off the perfect brunch at home. Geoffrey Zakarian kicks things off with his lambrusco spritz sangria. Then, bring on the benedicts with Geoffrey's smoked salmon eggs benedict with sauce maltaise.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Almost-Eggless Brunch
programme.desc: Not a fan of eggs, Guy Fieri's mood lifts as his chef friends make an almost-eggless brunch. Aarti Sequeira makes halloumi cheese bites with beetroot chutney, Michael Voltaggio mixes grapefruit daiquiris, and Justin Warner bakes cherry almond granola.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Build-Your-Own-Brunch Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes brunch to the next level by hosting a "BYOB" -- Build-Your-Own-Brunch party! She uses some of her favorite Mexican-themed dishes to create an epic food and beverage buffet for her friends to enjoy.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Bacon
programme.desc: Four competitors aim for bacon perfection as they attempt to advance to the grand finale of the comfort food feud. The appetizer basket includes a Japanese condiment and a bacon-y bar food, and biscuit dough is part of the puzzle in the entree round.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Burgers
programme.desc: In a burger-themed battle of the $25,000 Comfort Food Feud, the chefs get a deep-fried surprise and a sloppy classic in round one. In the entree round, they must figure out what to do with a bizarre canned product.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: The chefs try to conquer mac and cheese and claim a spot in the Comfort Food Feud grand finale. The first round basket includes a cocktail, and the entree round sees the competitors working with a mac and cheese-inspired brunch item.

programme.desc: Barney loses his self-confidence when two farmers ignore his orders.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Rafe Hollister Sings
programme.desc: Andy and Barney try to spruce up a farmer who auditions to sing at a concert.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Hot Rod Otis
programme.desc: Otis acquires a car and threatens Mayberry's residents.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: The Song Festers
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out sings him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Fun Girls
programme.desc: Two blonde women visit the sheriff's office and Andy drives them home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: The Case of the Punch on the Nose
programme.desc: Barney causes a division among the people of Mayberry over an old case.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: The Christmas Story
programme.desc: Andy and Barney have a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: All I Want for Christmas
programme.desc: All Ray wants for Christmas is a little loving from his wife and he's willing to try anything and everything to have his holiday wish come true. But when she falls victim to his charm on Christmas morning, the rest of the family has already arrived.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Toaster
programme.desc: Ray is devastated when he learns his parents traded in the Christmas gift he gave them.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Christmas Picture
programme.desc: Ray believes he's finally found the ultimate Christmas gift for his parents: a family portrait that his Mom and Dad can treasure forever. Much ballyhoo ensues when Debra and Marie have conflicting opinions about the meaning of family.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Christmas Present
programme.desc: Ray buys Debra an elaborate Christmas gift in hopes that she will let him go on a weekend golf trip with his buddies. But what he doesn't know is that Debra purchased an even more extravagant gift for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Warning, It's Dirty
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Jake on the art of infidelity while his girlfriend is away for Christmas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: One False Move, Zimbabwe
programme.desc: Walden's mother visits and Alan becomes smitten with her, even as she reveals a secret about Walden's past that sends him into a downward spiral.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Noel Cowards
programme.desc: When their car breaks down, Doug and Carrie realize they will have to buy a new one.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Net Prophets
programme.desc: When Carrie receives her Christmas bonus, Doug wants to invest it in his IPS pension fund.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Better Camera
programme.desc: Doug surprises Carrie with a new camera for Christmas, and Arthur writes a script.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ovary Action
programme.desc: As Doug and Carrie attempt to conceive a child, Doug's parents arrive for Christmas.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mentalo Case
programme.desc: The stage is set for a Christmas fiasco when Doug tries to find his favourite boyhood toy.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Santa Claustrophobia
programme.desc: Doug finds it difficult working with Carrie when she takes a temporary job at his company.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Kara-te
programme.desc: Barry decides to sign up for the school's holiday talent show, but is bummed when the school doesn't approve karate as a talent. Beverly is livid and brow beats the teacher in charge to change his mind.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Yippee Ki Yay Melon Farmer
programme.desc: Much to Beverly's chagrin, Barry is thrilled that he gets to celebrate Christmas now that he is engaged to Lainey. Meanwhile, Murray's brother Marvin makes a promise to Adam with a surprising outcome.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: It's Beginning to Stink a Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly attends her neighbour's holiday block party where she discovers a juicy secret.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Old Maid of Honor
programme.desc: Christine's plan to prove that she's comfortable with Richard's remarriage backfires when the date she's supposedly 'in love with' acts obnoxiously at the rehearsal dinner. Meanwhile, Matthew hooks up with New Christine's sister.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Love: A Cautionary Tale
programme.desc: Christine learns some shocking news about New Christine's father after the two of them rekindle their relationship at Richard's and New Christine's wedding.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Bahamian Rhapsody
programme.desc: After Barb was thrown in jail by immigration during Richard's and New Christine's disastrous wedding, Christine and Matthew head to the Bahamas to try to get her an illegal visa.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Burning Love
programme.desc: Christine and Richard are stunned when they meet up with some old college buddies and realize how much they have aged.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Mole
programme.desc: Christine discovers a suspicious mole but panics when she can't get into a doctor fast enough. Meanwhile, Richard decides he needs to move back in with New Christine.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: For Love or Money
programme.desc: After Barb has her lawyer send over divorce papers, Christine hires an aggressive divorce attorney who convinces her that Barb owes her alimony.

programme.title: Roseanne: Communicable Theater
programme.desc: Roseanne balances a more hectic day than usual: helping Jackie memorize her lines for a play, tending to flu-stricken Dan, and feigning excitement over DJ's merit-badge ceremony.

programme.title: Roseanne: Vegas Interruptus
programme.desc: When Roseanne and Dan leave for Las Vegas, Becky and Darlene throw a house party.

programme.title: Roseanne: Her Boyfriend's Back
programme.desc: Becky becomes a discipline problem when Mark re-enters her life.

programme.title: Roseanne: Troubles With the Rubbles
programme.desc: D.J. finds a friend, but Roseanne thinks his mother's a snob.

programme.title: Roseanne: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Dan re-writes his will after an accident in the construction-site portable toilet.

programme.title: Roseanne: Dances With Darlene
programme.desc: Roseanne fusses over Darlene when she gets ready for her first dance.

programme.title: Roseanne: Scenes From a Barbecue
programme.desc: Roseanne's loveable Grandma Mary pays a visit for Mother's Day.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Pied Piper of Lanford
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne's pal Ziggy blows into town and into Jackie's life.

programme.title: Roseanne: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: Roseanne has difficulty adjusting to the fact that Becky wants to start birth control.

programme.title: Roseanne: Take My Bike, Please
programme.desc: The Conners find it difficult making ends meet when they open their custom bike shop.

programme.title: Roseanne: Why Jackie Becomes a Trucker
programme.desc: Jackie makes a one-night mistake after spotting Gary at the Lobo and wants a change.

programme.title: Roseanne: Darlene Fades to Black
programme.desc: The Conners suspect something must be wrong with Darlene because of her new lifestyle.

programme.title: Roseanne: Tolerate Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: The Bowman's house is burglarized by men whom Roseanne assumed were charity workers.

programme.title: Roseanne: Trick Me Up Trick Me Down
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan play a Halloween prank on Kathy, and fear she will get them back.

programme.title: Roseanne: Vegas
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne's second honeymoon turns into a nightmare thanks to Dan's friends.

programme.desc: Mornings are always a good time with friends.

programme.title: America's News HQ
programme.desc: Features national and global headline news stories that matter to you.

programme.title: America's News HQ
programme.desc: Features national and global headline news stories that matter to you.

programme.title: The Journal Editorial Report
programme.desc: Paul Gigot, editor of the 'Wall Street Journal's' editorial page, moderates and hosts this weekly news and discussion program. He is joined by deputy editorial page editor Daniel Henninger and Pulitzer Prize winner Dorothy Rabinowitz.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: The Bears' Big Debut
programme.desc: Zoo staff becomes concerned when a sea lion called Margueretta falls severely ill, while Andean bear cubs prepare for their exhibit debut. An elderly camel called Max faces new challenges, and a red panda called Willow welcomes a pair of baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: Nile Crocs Big Move
programme.desc: The staff grows concerned when Tomistoma, a freshwater croc, stops laying eggs, while the vet team rears a newborn Thomson gazelle fawn abandoned by its mother. Then, it's moving day for the Nile crocs when keepers renovate their exhibit.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack
programme.desc: To help love bloom between two kiwis, zoo staff build an elaborate hut into which they introduce a pair of potential mates. When a king cobra arrives at the zoo, keepers have their hands full training him to move from the exhibit to a holding pen.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Tia and Country Matt team up to rescue a reportedly aggressive dog. When a local student wants to adopt a dog that can join her on runs, Earl joins in the training regimen. And, parolee Jammall oversees the care of a dog with serious health issues.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: The family of Mutt, an employee who recently passed away, meets the dog that he chose for them. A stray near a middle school leads Tia and M2 on a wild good chase. And, Lizzy and Moe tackle the challenging task of renovating the dog agility course.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Here in Their Golden Years
programme.desc: Wanting to give the senior dogs a special place, Lizzy, Tania, and Mariah create a 'retirement center' at one of the warehouses.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Match Made Perfect
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a stray dog on the train tracks near the Villalobos warehouse. Mariah enlists help to get to the bottom of her dog Tater's nagging pain. A senior dog with a long medical history finally has her shot at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Home Is Where the Dog Is
programme.desc: One of Earl's favourite senior dogs finally has a chance at a forever home. Tia heads to a small shelter in rural Louisiana to help with a hound that they took in. Tania, Mariah and Lizzy take on a project that showcases dogs in their forever homes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Tia's son Kanani, and his fiancée M2, prepare for their wedding. Parolee Jammall finds an abandoned dog and asks Mariah for help rescuing it. Plus, a mother and son visit Villalobos hoping to find a new friend for their family dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Too Late
programme.desc: Lizzy tries to track down the owner of a dog tied up outside the rescue. An older couple comes looking for their first dog, but their choice requires some special temperament testing. And, when a dog develops allergies, Mariah looks for a natural cure.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Dream Realized
programme.desc: Two strays lead Lizzy and Villalobos employees on a wild goose chase. A grandmother comes to Villalobos looking for another canine companion, but her dog Daisy has other plans. And, Tania pursues her dream to write a children's book.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: Movie: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Professor Klump takes a revolutionary potion that makes him shed some of his 400 pounds.

programme.title: Movie: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: Sherman Klump's alter ego, Buddy Love, gets loose and threatens the professor's blossoming relationship with a lovely researcher.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Family Reunion

programme.title: UFC Unleashed: Amanda Nunes vs. Holly Holm
programme.desc: Features the best of pay-per-view fights, quickest knockouts, and legendary fights and fighters.

programme.title: E:60: Alex Smith: Project 11
programme.desc: An exclusive look inside Washington quarterback Alex Smith's recovery from a 2018 leg injury that nearly cost him his life. Smith opens up about flesh-eating bacteria, limb salvage measures and what it was like to throw a football again.

programme.title: E:60: Pro Football Stories
programme.desc: The biggest names and best stories in sports.

programme.title: E:60: After the Storm
programme.desc: The biggest names and best stories in sports.

programme.title: NFL MatchUp
programme.desc: Matt Bowen, Sal Paolantonio and Greg Cosell bring viewers inside the film room for the X's and O's analysis of the weekend's NFL matchups.

programme.title: The American Game: Rivalries
programme.desc: If passion lies at the heart at college football, then rivalries are what fuel the passion in dramatic, intense and entertaining ways. In this sport, the more you want to beat your enemy, the more exciting that makes the matchup.

programme.title: The American Game: Games of the Century
programme.desc: The greatest games in college football history – the so-called games of the century – are remembered forever as contests where stars were born, legends were made and sport's chronicle was indelibly transformed.

programme.title: The American Game: Bowls, Polls and Champions
programme.desc: For generations, America was at least somewhat content to agree to often vehemently disagree. Controversies arose from the polls to computers to the creation of the BCS. At last, the College Football Playoff has offered a more decisive solution.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer: Rory McIlroy
programme.desc: Revisit the first Open win by Northern Ireland's Rory McIlroy. Watch him battle the elements to hold onto his victory of Sergio Garcia and Rickie Fowler.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer: Phil Mickelson
programme.desc: Phil Mickelson revisits 2013 win at the Open at Muirfield and how the path of his life made him a champion golfer.

programme.title: The Open for the Ages
programme.desc: The greatest players of all-time take part in a reimagined Open Championship at St. Andrews. Cleverly edited footage of Seve Ballesteros, Jack Nicklaus, Tiger Woods, Tom Watson, Rory McIlroy, among several other legends all at the peak of their careers.

programme.title: Feherty: Rory McIlroy
programme.desc: Feherty begins his summer swing with four-time major champion, Rory McIlroy, the day after the Ulsterman's emotional win at the 2016 Irish Open. Rory thoughtfully shares about the thrill of winning under pressure.

programme.title: Feherty: Condoleezza Rice
programme.desc: David Feherty sits down with former Secretary of State Dr. Condoleezza Rice. Topics include the experience of growing up in the segregated southern states, music, golf, college football and her political future.

programme.title: Feherty: Tommy Fleetwood
programme.desc: Tommy Fleetwood discusses his emergence as an elite golfer and stories from his career. Plus, learn about his experience at the Open from sneaking in as a seven year old to shooting a record tying 63 as a pro.

programme.title: Feherty: Brooks Koepka
programme.desc: Feherty sits poolside in south Florida with 2018 U.S. Open and PGA champion Brooks Koepka. Discussions include a no-nonsense look at his unconventional road to elite status, his three career defining major wins and his outspoken approach to stardom.

programme.title: Feherty: Shane Lowry
programme.desc: David sits down with 2019 Open champion Shane Lowry. This spirited player from the Republic of Ireland recalls all the inside stories from his remarkable major victory and why he wouldn’t change a thing about the compelling journey that got him there.

programme.title: Feherty: Fred Couples: Boom Boom
programme.desc: David Feherty travels to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico to sit down with Fred Couples as the hall of famer discusses his life and career. Fred discusses his win at the 1992 Masters, his time ranked as the top golfer in the world and his nonchalant approach.

programme.title: Feherty: Fred Couples: King of Cool
programme.desc: Picturesque Cabo San Lucas, Mexico is the setting for the second half of David Feherty’s discussion with former World Number One golfer, Fred Couples. Fred discusses heartbreaks at the Ryder Cup, his domination of the silly season and the Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Feherty: Bryson DeChambeau
programme.desc: In Feherty’s hometown of Dallas, Texas, he meets up with analytical marvel Bryson DeChambeau where they delve into his love of science and how he applies it to the game.

programme.title: Feherty: Michael Strahan
programme.desc: David Feherty sits down with Michael Strahan for a fast and fun conversation covering Michael's Hall of Fame career in the NFL and his subsequent emergence as a morning television star. Strahan discusses the Super Bowl, growing up in Germany and more.

programme.title: Feherty: Doc Rivers
programme.desc: Feherty travels to Los Angeles for an eye opening conversation with Doc Rivers, the coach of the Los Angeles Clippers. They discuss golf, trash talking and how the events of his life prepared him to cope with a bizarre racial scandal.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Gene Littler vs. Pete Brown
programme.desc: Match between Gene Littler and Pete Brown played at Glen Eagles, Scotland.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Phil Mickelson vs. David Toms
programme.desc: The 2002 match that rekindled the rivalry from the 2001 PGA Championship.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Arnold Palmer vs. Chi Chi Rodriguez vs. Gay Brewer
programme.desc: Classic golf match between Hall of Famer Arnold Palmer, 1967 Texas Open winner, Chi Chi Rodriguez, and the 1967 Masters Champion, Gay Brewer played at El Conquistador Golf Club, Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Byron Nelson vs. Gene Littler
programme.desc: Classic golf match between two time Masters winner Byron Nelson and Gene Littler.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Crossing the Line

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Heath Bar Farm
programme.desc: A popular teacher was savagely murdered in her home. There would be an arrest, a trial, and a conviction. When a bombshell came in after the verdict, the convicted murderer was given a chance at freedom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Secret
programme.desc: Was a man missing or was he hiding; on the surface it didn't make sense: he had a wife, a good job, a daughter he loved. Investigators were told he also had a secret and they went on an undercover mission to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on the Emerald Coast
programme.desc: Marie Carlson was radiant but behind the glow she hid a darkness. For a while, Marie drifted but, then, a pastor and his wife welcomed her into their lives. It was a spiritual awakening which made Marie's disappearance all the more mysterious.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Scott Peterson
programme.desc: When 8 months pregnant Laci Peterson went missing on Christmas Eve 2002, her disappearance became a shocking national story. Scott, convicted of her murder 15 years ago, now has grounds for an appeal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Day She Disappeared
programme.desc: A young mother disappeared one morning. Her husband said she went out for a run and never came home. She was found strangled to death.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Heart Of Darkness
programme.desc: Vacationers turned prisoners, a mother, her son and a cousin kidnapped by terrorists. It was a harrowing international hostage drama and the price of freedom was a huge ransom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A California couple's romantic getaway on a boat turns tragic when the young wife and mother is lost at sea.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Morning Murder
programme.desc: A holiday is ruined when a couple is murdered during what looks like a brutal home invasion. Police learn the true motive for the double homicide is a shocking tale of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: New Year's in a tiny town, Joanna and Carl Dutcher ring in the year with their grandson. Days later, they are found violently killed. The hunt for the killer leads police to a sinister group that threatens the entire community.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Holiday Terror
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Dateline: Everything She Knew
programme.desc: A young woman's murder remains unsolved until someone comes forward to reveal her own harrowing story.

programme.title: Dateline: Unspeakable
programme.desc: A couple's anniversary celebration ends in murder in what appears to be a home invasion. Investigators think the suspect is much closer to the victim.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Rainboy/ Louisiana
programme.desc: Man terrorized by mysterious streams of water; Klan related murders in Louisiana; donut murder; couple killed over social security benefits.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Baron 52 Crew
programme.desc: Missing Baron 52 crew; woman scared to death; Shannon Mohr poisoning; rest stop killer; lost love.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Carnage in Carnation
programme.desc: The holiday season screeches to a halt when six members of the Anderson family are discovered to have been gunned down in their home. Detectives work closely with family friends to track down the shocking murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Bloody New Years
programme.desc: Just before New Years, a hockey mom is gunned down at her front door. Later that night, seven more bodies are found in another suburban home. Police discover a shocking connection between the two crimes as they track down the killer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: New Year's in a tiny town, Joanna and Carl Dutcher ring in the year with their grandson. Days later, they are found violently killed. The hunt for the killer leads police to a sinister group that threatens the entire community.

programme.title: Snapped: Brynn Hartman
programme.desc: The celebrity murder that shocked a nation, one of the country's leading comedians is gunned down in his own home.

programme.title: Movie: Office Christmas Party
programme.desc: When his CEO sister threatens to shut down his branch, the manager decides to throw an epic Christmas party to impress a big client and close a sale that will save their jobs. As the entire city hears about the party, it quickly spins out of control.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: After Moe convinces Homer to stay out drinking on Christmas Eve, Marge tells Homer not to come home. This leads to Homer's sad trek through lonely Springfield, where he learns that the only place where one should truly get drunk on Christmas is home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: White Christmas Blues
programme.desc: Springfield is inundated with holiday revellers after the nuclear power plant springs a radiation leak, causing snow to fall all over town. When the tourists drive up Christmas shopping prices, Marge opens up the Simpsons' house to boarders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2
programme.desc: The family is stuck with an unwanted houseguest after they open their home to Gil for the Christmas holidays. After a full year, an attempt at getting him a job and many failed 'accidents,' Marge finally grows a spine and throws Gil out Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 'Tis the Fifteenth Season
programme.desc: Homer brings a Joe DiMaggio rookie card to Comic Book Guy, where he gets everything he has in the register for the card. With this financial windfall, the Simpson family goes Christmas shopping at the Springfield Heights Promenade.

programme.title: The Simpsons: She of Little Faith
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a Buddhist after a careless Homer sends her into a religious quandary.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Skinner's Sense of Snow
programme.desc: The students and Principal Skinner find themselves snowed in at the elementary school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grift of the Magi
programme.desc: When a private company buys the school, Lisa discovers that it's a top toy company conducting research to design their hot new Christmas toy. Lisa and Bart go to investigate the company but are stymied by its security guard, Gary Coleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miracle on Evergreen Terrace

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Be Not Proud

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery

programme.title: Archer: Archer Dreamland: No Good Deed

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Power of the Pod
programme.desc: Curious about sustainability, George heads to Cincinnati to explore the evolution of laundry detergent pods and the impact on water and energy usage.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Sustainable Distilling
programme.desc: Following the Bourbon Trail from Grain to Glass, George sends Darieth to Kentucky to explore sustainability initiatives and how tradition is blending with science and innovation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: On a snowy Pittsburgh night a young doctor is found beaten, slashed and slain in his bathtub. While everyone struggles with the shocking loss, detectives develop a psychological profile of a killer who will likely strike again unless they find him.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: A frigid winter hovers over St Paul, Minnesota. 30 year old Kira Steger hasn't reported to work and her family and friends are terrified she might be in danger. Her disappearance leads to a three month investigation that halts to a heartbreaking ending.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly winter morning in St. Louis, an eleven year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. She's been brutally murdered. It's a race against time for investigators who fear the elusive killer will strike again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Children of the Snow: The Darkest Winter
programme.desc: In 1976, the first of four children are abducted and murdered in the suburbs of Detroit. After more than 30 years the families of the four murdered children and Detroiters like J. Reuben Appelman are determined to find the Oakland County Child Killer.

programme.title: Children of the Snow: The Darkest Winter
programme.desc: In 1976, the first of four children are abducted and murdered in the suburbs of Detroit. After more than 30 years the families of the four murdered children and Detroiters like J. Reuben Appelman are determined to find the Oakland County Child Killer.

programme.title: Children of the Snow: Uncovered
programme.desc: Frustrated by decades of police silence, one victim's family puts the case back on the front page. Detective Williams gets a big break in the Oakland County Child Killer. New technology reveals new leads from old evidence.

programme.title: Children of the Snow: Uncovered
programme.desc: Detectives follow new leads from old evidence. Frustrated families hope new science and old-fashioned genealogy will finally reveal who killed the four children of the snow.

programme.desc: Detectives follow new leads from old evidence. Frustrated families hope new science and old-fashioned genealogy will finally reveal who killed the four children of the snow.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: North Pole Slay Ride
programme.desc: The tiny town of North Pole, Alaska is a quiet, safe haven best known for Santa Claus. But when the bodies of young women begin turning up one by one, investigators slowly piece together the clues and discover the unlikeliest of killers.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Lamb Among Wolves
programme.desc: When a beautiful model is found dead in her Washington state home, family members fear for her missing daughter. Police have no shortage of suspects - and two sets of DNA at the scene. They must sort through twisting lies to uncover the dark truth.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder
programme.desc: Chris Northam is an entrepreneur building his extreme sports business in the suburb of Roseville, California. When he is fatally gunned down in his warehouse, detectives look to his disgruntled employees and his mistress in search of the killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Evil in Idaho
programme.desc: Lisa Stukey lives in the small, picturesque community of Idaho Falls, Idaho. After she's not heard from for weeks, her decomposing body is found inside her home. When police finally catch the culprit, the killer has shocking ties to the victim.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Last Walk to Bad Creek
programme.desc: The discovery of the bullet-riddled bodies of Skyla Whitaker and Taylor Placker in tiny Weleetka, Oklahoma sends the community into a state of panic. If two of Weleetka's most innocent can fall victim to the sadistic killer, no one in town is safe.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Eggtastic
programme.desc: The remaining recruits enter boot camp to find it has been transformed into a casino complete with a game of Egg Roulette. The chefs will teach their recruits a pancake recipe and ask them to recreate it.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Cowboy Cuisine
programme.desc: The recruits enter boot camp and discover they will be going back to the basics with meat-and-potatoes challenges. First, they learn that cooking is about more than just taste in a Skill Drill that tests all five of their senses.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Meat Me at the Game
programme.desc: The recruits must put on their game faces because it's time for Game Day! First, the teams go head-to-head in a potato sack relay race to collect ingredients for game-day meatballs.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: The recruits take part in a skill drill where they must identify various commonly used spices. Next, they must make their own spice rubs. For the main dish challenge, the chefs teach their recruits how to make an Indian-inspired curry dish.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Carnival Chaos
programme.desc: After finding that boot camp has been turned into a carnival, the recruits are asked to participate in a pie-eating contest for the chance to dunk their opponent's chef.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Aloha, Recruits!
programme.desc: The recruits begin by embarking on a treasure hunt fit for a pirate when their teams are tasked with discovering clues left for them by pirate captains Anne Burrell and Tyler Florence.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: In It to Win It
programme.desc: It's the penultimate week of boot camp and if the remaining recruits want a spot in the finale, they must first work in teams to play Remote Control Chef.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: The Day We've Been Waiting For
programme.desc: The final two recruits begin with one last Skill Drill before Anne Burrell and Tyler Florence give them the opportunity to pick any dish they'd like to learn in a private lesson.
